strengths: Provides vivid examples of communication skills, such as crafting ad scripts and managing customer interactions
Demonstrates research skills through primary interviews and secondary multimedia sources aligned to the learning goal
Shows growth in social skills by engaging with diverse resources (book, podcast, survey) to influence stakeholders
Illustrates organization skills with a Notion accounting page that structures financial data clearly
Exhibits strong time-management by coordinating Notion and Google Calendar to balance entrepreneurial work and other commitments
weaknesses: Lacks reflection on how the organization system impacted decision-making or performance metrics, limiting evidence of ATL skill effectiveness
feedback.calculationMethod: Mini report holistic evaluation: The applicant effectively showcases a range of ATL skills with concrete examples that support both the learning goal and product creation. Strengthening the reflection on how these tools influenced outcomes would underscore their strategic impact.

strengths: Clearly articulates personal interest in entrepreneurship and connects it convincingly to the learning goal
Provides concrete evidence of sustained commitment through past entrepreneurial experiences
Defines the intended productâa Shopify dropshipping storeâwith clear justification of feasibility and community impact
Includes quantitative success metrics (e.g., profit thresholds, follower counts) to demonstrate understanding of measurable targets
Presents a systematic research plan table outlining topics, sub-topics, and reputable sources
Offers a detailed task breakdown with dates, showing logical sequencing and strong time-management planning
weaknesses: Success criteria table is incomplete, showing only one row instead of covering all categories with measurable details
A sentence describing success criteria is cut off mid-thought, indicating the need for full articulation
Plan for achieving the product could better integrate resource identification and risk mitigation for each phase
feedback.calculationMethod: Mini report holistic evaluation: The planning section excels in demonstrating intrinsic motivation and a well-structured roadmap, with clearly defined products, metrics, and timelines. However, it falls short of fully documenting all success criteria and ensuring every descriptive element is complete and measurable.

strengths: Articulates significant personal growth in confidence and discipline, linking these gains directly to project activities
Demonstrates mature insight by recognizing how structured planning turns aspirations into reachable goals
Includes a comprehensive marking table that evaluates all success criteria and highlights areas for improvement
weaknesses: Product evaluation table only addresses one criterion, requiring extension to assess all success metrics with supporting evidence
Community feedback is listed but lacks detail on how specific suggestions will be implemented to close the feedback loop
feedback.calculationMethod: Mini report holistic evaluation: Reflection shows genuine self-awareness and balanced critique, with clear examples of learning impact. To deepen this analysis, the student should systematically evaluate every success criterion and articulate concrete plans for integrating stakeholder feedback.

annotations.comment: The product evaluation table only addresses one criterion; extend it to assess each success criterion with evidence to fully evaluate your outcomes.
The success criteria table currently only shows one row; expand it to include all criteria categories and descriptors to ensure comprehensive, measurable targets.
Your examples of communication skillsâfrom writing ad scripts to managing customer interactionsâdemonstrate versatile application of ATL skills.
This sentence is cut off mid-thought; ensure you fully articulate all success criteria with measurable details rather than leaving it incomplete.
You clearly articulate your personal interest in business and connect it to your learning goal, demonstrating strong intrinsic motivation and a coherent rationale for choosing this project.
Your description of past entrepreneurial experiences reinforces your genuine interest and provides concrete evidence of sustained commitment.
Including quantitative metrics (e.g., profit thresholds, follower counts) demonstrates an understanding of measurable success indicators.
You present a clear intended productâa Shopify dropshipping storeâand justify its selection with community impact and feasibility.
The research plan table systematically outlines topics, sub-topics, and sources, illustrating organized preparation to meet your learning goal.
Your detailed task breakdown with dates shows strong sequencing and time management for achieving each phase of the product plan.
You provide concrete examples of primary and secondary research, including interviews and multimedia, clearly applying research skills toward your learning goal.
You proactively developed social skills by engaging with diverse resources (book, podcast, survey), showing growth in understanding and influencing others.
You articulate significant personal growthâconfidence and disciplineâand link these directly to the product process, showing reflective depth.
Your application of organization skillsâcreating a Notion accounting pageâprovides a clear example of how you structured financial data effectively.
Using Notion and Google Calendar together highlights strong time-management skills, balancing multiple commitments and improving productivity.
Consider reflecting on how this organization page impacted your decision-making or performance metrics to strengthen the evidence of ATL skill effectiveness.
Your insight that planning transforms dreams into achievable goals demonstrates mature reflection on how your approach influenced learning.
Your comprehensive marking table on page 12 covers all success criteria with scores and suggests areas for improvement, reflecting balanced evaluation.
You list valuable community feedback from your survey; consider detailing how you will implement specific suggestions to close the feedback loop.
